mapper.select: SELECT m.milestone_id, m.project_id, m.user_code, m.milestone_title, m.milestone_describe, m.finish_date, CASE WHEN NVL(stats.avg_progress, 0) = 100 THEN 'g2' ELSE m.milestone_status END AS milestone_status, m.created_at, m.updated_at, NVL(stats.total_count, 0) AS total_task_count, NVL(stats.closed_count, 0) AS closed_task_count, NVL(stats.avg_progress, 0) AS progress_percentage, t.task_id, t.task_title, t.task_progress, t.finish_date AS task_finish_date, u.user_name AS task_manager_name, tt.type_name AS type_name, cc.default_describe AS default_describe FROM milestone m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT milestone_id, COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN task_progress = 100 THEN 1 END) AS closed_count, ROUND(AVG(NVL(task_progress, 0))) AS avg_progress FROM task GROUP BY milestone_id ) stats ON m.milestone_id = stats.milestone_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tk.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY milestone_id ORDER BY created_at DESC) AS rn FROM task tk ) t ON m.milestone_id = t.milestone_id AND t.rn <= 5 LEFT JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code LEFT JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON t.task_status = cc.common_id WHERE m.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, t.created_at DESC
SELECT milestone_id, project_id, user_code, milestone_title, milestone_describe, finish_date, milestone_status, created_at, updated_at FROM milestone WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(milestone_id), 0) + 1 AS milestoneId FROM milestone
INSERT INTO milestone ( milestone_id, project_id, user_code, milestone_title, milestone_describe, finish_date, milestone_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{milestoneId}, #{projectId}, #{userCode}, #{milestoneTitle}, #{milestoneDescribe}, #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{milestoneStatus}, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE milestone SET milestone_title = #{milestoneTitle}, milestone_describe = #{milestoneDescribe}, finish_date = #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, milestone_status = #{milestoneStatus}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId}
